description: STdiff function for differential expression analysis in spatial transcriptomics data.
author: GenePattern Team + ChatGPT
plan:
## spatialGE.STdiff GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
spatialGE.STdiff is a GenePattern module that STdiff function for differential expression analysis in spatial transcriptomics data.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 15 parameters:
- Required: x
- Optional: samples, annot, w, k, deepSplit, topgenes, pval_thr, pval_adj, sp_topgenes, clusters, pairwise, verbose, cores, plot

### 3. Command Line
```
Rscript <libdir>stdiff_wrapper_ai.R --x <x> <samples> <annot> <w> <k> <deepSplit> <topgenes> <pval_thr> <pval_adj> <sp_topgenes> <clusters> <pairwise> <verbose> <cores> <plot>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/spatialgp.preprocessing\:0.4

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: STList object in .RDS file format to cluster on.

parameters.name: samples
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of sample indices or names to include in DE tests

parameters.name: annot
parameters.description: Column name in x@spatial_meta containing groups/clusters to be tested

parameters.name: w
parameters.description: Spatial weight used in STclust. Required if annot is empty

parameters.name: k
parameters.description: k value used in STclust, or 'dtc' for dynamicTreeCut clusters. Required if annot is empty

parameters.name: deepSplit
parameters.description: deepSplit value if used in STclust. Required if k\='dtc'

parameters.name: topgenes
parameters.description: Number of top variable genes to select from each sample based on variance

parameters.name: pval_thr
parameters.description: Cut-off of adjusted p-values to define differentially expressed genes

parameters.name: pval_adj
parameters.description: Method to adjust p-values. Defaults to 'FDR'

parameters.name: sp_topgenes
parameters.description: Proportion of DE genes from non-spatial models to use in spatial models

parameters.name: clusters
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of cluster names to test DE genes

parameters.name: pairwise
parameters.description: Whether to carry tests on a pairwise manner

parameters.name: verbose
parameters.description: Output progress indicators. 0 for no text, 1 for basic, 2 for detailed

parameters.name: cores
parameters.description: Number of cores to use in parallelization
